title: ilex machilifolia
intro: Ilex machilifolia, also known as the New Caledonian holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex machilifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Ilex machilifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
